---
name: Product review note
about: Capture portfolio, UX, or product-readiness feedback
title: "[Product Review]: "
labels: product-review
assignees: ""
---

## Review Area

- [ ] README or landing page
- [ ] Dashboard UX
- [ ] Demo scenario
- [ ] Generated output
- [ ] Portfolio positioning
- [ ] Limitations or evidence language

## Feedback

What should be improved?

## Why It Matters

Explain the reviewer, user, or maintainer impact.

## Out Of Scope Check

- [ ] This feedback does not require forecasting.
- [ ] This feedback does not require investment, trading, legal, or compliance advice.
- [ ] This feedback does not require live web monitoring unless explicitly scoped as future work.
